title: SkyWing Airlines
description: Flight search results with nested fare cards, filter sidebar with decoy ads, promotional banners disguised as results, mega-menu navigation, cookie consent overlays.
challenges: Sponsored results disguised as real flight cards
Mega-menu with dozens of nested navigation links
Filter sidebar with range sliders and hidden sections
Tracking pixels and analytics scripts in DOM
Fare comparison tables hidden behind toggle buttons

task.goal: Select the cheapest nonstop Economy flight from JFK to LAX

standardSteps.note: Agent parses 200+ elements, finds 40+ clickable targets
Mistakenly clicks promotional ad link in mega-menu
Returns to search results, re-parses DOM
Clicks inline promotional banner thinking it's a flight
Confused by promotional content mixed with results
Tries to sort by price but unsure which select element
Finally identifies correct button after multiple attempts
No confirmation — must re-parse DOM to verify selection

agentdomSteps.note: Gets 3 flight results with prices in structured JSON
Identifies SW1042 Economy $329 as cheapest nonstop
Direct action on typed node with ActionResult confirmation

singleShot.goal: Select the cheapest nonstop Economy flight from JFK to LAX

multiStep.title: Primary Multi-step Completion
multiStep.goal: Select the cheapest nonstop Economy flight from JFK to LAX Complete the flow end-to-end and verify final state without leaving the page.
prerequisites: Stay on current app flow (avoid external navigation)
completionCriteria: No decoy ids triggered: select-UA447-economy, select-DL892-economy, modify-search-btn, reset-filters-btn
